results.title: Open edX Frontend Plugin Framework
results.description: A framework for developing and integrating frontend plugins within the Open edX platform, facilitating modular and extensible UI development.

results.title: Anthropic Quickstarts
results.description: A collection of projects designed to help developers quickly get started building applications using the Anthropic API, featuring examples like customer support agents and financial data analysts.

results.title: Anthropic API
results.description: Documentation for the Anthropic API, covering Admin API functionalities for managing organizations, users, and invites, as well as guidance on using beta headers for experimental features.

results.title: Anthropic.SDK
results.description: An unofficial C# client for interacting with the Claude AI API, simplifying integration into C# applications and supporting various .NET targets.

results.title: Anthropic Ruby SDK
results.description: The Anthropic Ruby library provides convenient access to the Anthropic REST API from any Ruby 3.2.0+ application, supporting features like streaming responses and file uploads.

results.title: Hands-on Plugin System for Backend
results.description: A backend plugin system implementation with hot reload support, featuring runtime loading/unloading, dependency injection, circular dependency detection, and event-driven inter-plugin communication.

results.title: Anthropic SDK for Java
results.description: The Anthropic Java SDK provides convenient access to the Anthropic REST API from applications written in Java.

results.title: Anthropic C# API Library
results.description: The Anthropic C# API Library is an official beta SDK providing convenient access to the Anthropic REST API from C# applications, featuring streaming, error handling, and flexible configuration.

results.title: Anthropic API and Claude
results.description: Official documentation for the Anthropic API and Claude, offering guides and resources for developers to integrate powerful AI models and build applications.

results.title: Anthropic SDK Go
results.description: The Anthropic Go library provides convenient access to the Anthropic REST API from applications written in Go.

results.title: Anthropic Go API Library
results.description: Anthropic Go SDK provides convenient, typed access to the Anthropic REST API for Go applications, including messaging, streaming, tool-calling, and utilities for request/response modeling and omitzero JSON semantics.

results.title: Plugin Tools
results.description: A collection of libraries, components, and utilities for automating and simplifying the development of frontend plugins.

results.title: Astral Frontend Architecture Guide
results.description: Astral Frontend Architecture Guide provides an architectural methodology for frontend projects, using technologies like React, TypeScript, and Next.js, and emphasizing layered architecture with directed dependencies.

results.title: Anthropic SDK TypeScript
results.description: A TypeScript library providing convenient access to the Anthropic REST API for server-side applications, supporting streaming responses, message batches, and tool use.

results.title: Obsidian Dev Utils
results.description: Obsidian Dev Utils is a collection of essential functions and CLI tools designed to streamline Obsidian plugin development, simplifying workflows with features like automated builds and linting.

results.title: Anthropic API Proxy
results.description: A proxy server enabling Anthropic clients (like Claude Code) to use Gemini, OpenAI, or direct Anthropic models by translating requests via LiteLLM, handling both streaming and non-streaming responses.

results.title: Protobuf Maven Plugin
results.description: A modern Maven plugin for seamless protoc integration, supporting native and JVM-based plugins, automatic dependency resolution, and incremental code generation for various languages.

results.title: Anthropic SDK for Python
results.description: The Anthropic Python library provides convenient access to the Anthropic REST API, offering synchronous and asynchronous clients with type definitions for all request parameters and response fields.

results.title: Kirby Headless
results.description: A Kirby plugin for developers to use Kirby's backend for frontend applications, static site generators, or mobile apps, enabling headless CMS functionality or building headless-first from scratch.

results.title: auto-i18n Translation Plugins
results.description: A frontend automatic translation plugin supporting various JS frameworks and build tools, enabling one-click multilingual support with multiple translation services.

results.title: Morpheus Plugin API
results.description: The Morpheus Plugin API is a Java 8-based library for creating plugins that extend and add various functionalities, such as UI extensions, task types, and cloud/network providers, to the Morpheus platform.

results.title: ItemsAdder
results.description: ItemsAdder is a plugin that allows users to configure and create custom items for their projects.

results.title: Docusaurus OpenAPI Docs
results.description: An OpenAPI plugin for Docusaurus v3 that generates API reference documentation from OpenAPI specifications, offering features like code samples, tag grouping, and vendor extension support.

results.title: In App Purchase
results.description: A Flutter plugin that provides a storefront-independent API for making in-app purchases through the App Store and Google Play.

results.title: Faro JavaScript Bundler Plugins
results.description: A collection of plugins for various JavaScript bundlers used with the Faro Web SDK to unlock additional features in Grafana Cloud Frontend Observability, primarily for uploading source maps.

results.title: Micro Frontends
results.description: Explores techniques, strategies, and recipes for building modern web applications with multiple teams that can deliver functionalities independently, extending the idea of microservices to frontend development.

results.title: Decky Plugin Template
results.description: A reference example for using decky-frontend-lib in a decky-loader plugin, providing guidance for developing and submitting plugins for the Steam Deck.

results.title: Frontend-tools
results.description: A common repository containing various frontend tools such as configurations, hooks, and functions.

results.title: Chrome DevTools Frontend
results.description: The client-side of the Chrome DevTools, providing the web application interface for debugging and inspecting web pages, built with TypeScript and CSS.
